sigWerErrors.reason: 'Muốn' means 'want' (expressing desire), while 'Mũ' means 'hat' (an unrelated noun). This substitution changes the meaning of the sentence significantly and makes it incoherent.
The repeated insertion of 'cái' (which means 'thing') is unnecessary and makes the sentence awkward and less clear, but the overall intent of the sentence can still be understood.
